title: Force rebuild to fix stuck/hanging draft preview

requirements.text: Perform a clean rebuild and redeploy of the entire application (frontend and backend) to resolve the draft preview hanging on load. Ensure all previously implemented features are preserved and the app loads successfully after deployment.

quotes: tried all 3 steps still it is stuck

acceptanceCriteria: The draft/preview URL loads without hanging or indefinite spinner
The dashboard renders correctly after login
All previously implemented features (monthly snapshots, asset forms, charts, mock rate fetchers) remain intact
No console errors blocking initial render

constraints: Do not remove or regress any existing features during the rebuild
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Adding new features in this build
Changing any data models or backend logic
Modifying the visual design or layout
